narrative:
Osnaburg A (precinct in Stark County) has 985 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
